headline: Nasdaq (NDAQ) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
summary: Nasdaq (NDAQ) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: NDAQ Stock Rises 1.6% in a Year: A Signal for Investors to Hold Tight?
summary: Nasdaq's expanding non-trading businesses, strategic acquisitions and shareholder returns position it for sustained long-term growth.
